root_text.sn37.15:1.1: Atha kho āyasmā anuruddho yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā …pe… ekamantaṁ nisinno kho āyasmā anuruddho bhagavantaṁ etadavoca:
root_text.sn37.15:1.2: “idhāhaṁ, bhante, mātugāmaṁ passāmi dibbena cakkhunā visuddhena atikkantamānusakena kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā sugatiṁ saggaṁ lokaṁ upapajjantaṁ.
root_text.sn37.15:1.3: Katīhi nu kho, bhante, dhammehi samannāgato mātugāmo kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā sugatiṁ saggaṁ lokaṁ upapajjatī”ti?
root_text.sn37.15:2.1: “Pañcahi kho, anuruddha, dhammehi samannāgato mātugāmo kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā sugatiṁ saggaṁ lokaṁ upapajjati.
root_text.sn37.15:2.3: Saddho ca hoti, hirimā ca hoti, ottappī ca hoti, akkodhano ca hoti, paññavā ca hoti—
root_text.sn37.15:2.4: imehi kho, anuruddha, pañcahi dhammehi samannāgato mātugāmo kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā sugatiṁ saggaṁ lokaṁ upapajjatī”ti.

translation_text.sn37.15:1.1: Then Venerable Anuruddha went up to the Buddha … and asked him,
translation_text.sn37.15:1.2: “Sometimes, sir, with my clairvoyance that’s purified and superhuman, I see that a lady—when her body breaks up, after death—is reborn in a good place, a heavenly realm.
translation_text.sn37.15:1.3: How many qualities do ladies have so that they’re reborn in a good place, a heavenly realm?”
translation_text.sn37.15:2.1: “Anuruddha, when ladies have five qualities, when their body breaks up, after death, they are reborn in a good place, a heavenly realm.
translation_text.sn37.15:2.3: They’re faithful, conscientious, prudent, loving, and wise.
translation_text.sn37.15:2.4: When ladies possess these five qualities, when their body breaks up, after death, they are reborn in a good place, a heavenly realm.”
